options.subject: Re: When I am back in chicgaooooooo
options.body: Thank you for your message. I look forward to connecting with you further when you return to Chicago. Please feel free to reach out at that time, and we can schedule a convenient time to meet or discuss any matters of interest. Safe travels.

options.subject: Re: When I am back in chicgaooooooo
options.body: Nice! Can't wait till you're back in Chicago. We should definitely catch up when you get back. Just hit me up and let me know when you're around!

options.subject: Re: When I am back in chicgaooooooo
options.body: Sounds good! Let me know when you're back and we can meet up.
